output:
Implemented batch 3 for timeline save conflict recovery. `useTimelineSave.ts` now surfaces an explicit exhausted-conflict state plus a retry callback, routes exhausted 406 recovery into the existing dialog flow, keeps local edits retryable with a fresh server version, prevents stale pending-save drains after a successful save, and adds `[TimelineSave]` dev logs for conflict detection, retry attempts, retry success, and retry exhaustion. The dialog wiring was threaded through timeline data/state into `useTimelineRealtime` and `VideoEditorShell`, and `VideoEditorShell.tsx` also had two unused icon imports removed so targeted lint could pass.

Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineSave.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineData.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineState.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineState.types.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineRealtime.ts src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorShell.tsx` passed.

Best-effort checkpointing was not written because `.megaplan/plans/light-megaplan-fix-the-20260327-0056/execution_batch_3.json` was not writable.
deviations: Advisory audit finding: Git status shows changed files not claimed by any task: .megaplan/debt.json, .megaplan/plans/light-megaplan-consolidate-20260327-0022, .megaplan/plans/light-megaplan-fix-the-20260327-0056
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC6 is missing an executor acknowledgment.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added explicit exhausted-conflict state and recovery plumbing. `useTimelineSave.ts` now sets `isConflictExhausted` plus `saveStatus = 'error'` on exhausted/load-failed conflicts without forcing `savedSeqRef`, exposes `retrySaveAfterConflict()` to reload the current version and retry the local draft, clears the exhausted state on successful save/reload, and keeps `reloadFromServer()` as the discard path. That state/callback is threaded through `useTimelineData.ts`, `useTimelineState.types.ts`, and `useTimelineState.ts`, then consumed by `useTimelineRealtime.ts` and `VideoEditorShell.tsx` so the existing dialog opens from explicit exhausted-conflict state and its 'Keep local draft' action now re-attempts save with a refreshed version. Verified by targeted code inspection and passing ESLint on all touched files.

Updated the serialized drain path in `useTimelineSave.ts` so successful save cycles carry a shared `completedSeqRef`, clear `pendingSaveRef` before draining, and only re-run a queued save when `pendingSave.seq > completedSeqRef.current`. This prevents re-submitting an already-persisted snapshot after conflict-retry success while preserving pending-save drain behavior when no save completed. Verified by targeted inspection of the save/finally path and passing ESLint.

Added `[TimelineSave]` logs in `useTimelineSave.ts` for conflict detection (`expectedVersion`/`actualVersion`), retry firing (`attempt`, `expectedVersion`, `actualVersion`), retry success (`attempts`, `finalVersion`), and retry exhaustion (`expectedVersion`, `actualVersion` when known, `retries`, `reason`). Verified by targeted inspection of the conflict-handling branch and passing ESLint.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified the exhausted-conflict path now uses explicit conflict state instead of forcing `savedSeqRef`: `handleConflictExhausted` only sets `isConflictExhausted` and `saveStatus = 'error'`, with no `savedSeqRef` override. `VideoEditorShell` passes `chrome.isConflictExhausted` plus `chrome.retrySaveAfterConflict` into `useTimelineRealtime`, so the existing dialog opens from that state. 'Keep local draft' now calls `retrySaveAfterConflict()`, which refreshes `configVersionRef` from `loadTimeline()` before re-invoking `saveTimeline`, and 'Discard and reload' still calls `reloadFromServer()`, which clears exhausted state, drops pending saves, and resets the local dirty/edit state back to the server snapshot.

Verified the pending-save drain no longer resubmits already-saved data. `saveTimeline` now carries a shared `completedSeqRef`; on successful save it records the exact saved `seq`, and the outer `finally` clears `pendingSaveRef` before draining and only drains when `pendingSave.seq > completedSeqRef.current`. The drain still runs only after `isSavingRef.current` is reset to `false` on the outer save cycle, so the next queued save re-enters through the normal guard and does not race with the in-flight attempt.

Verified all added conflict-recovery logs are tagged `[TimelineSave]`. The conflict-detected log includes `expectedVersion` and `actualVersion`; the retry-fire log includes `attempt`, `expectedVersion`, and `actualVersion`; the retry-success log includes `attempts` and `finalVersion`; and the exhausted log includes retry count plus version context when available (`expectedVersion`, `actualVersion`, `retries`, `reason`).
